form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr4) over 1710m at Goulburn, beaten 30 m by Happily (2:05.30) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $71. Two runs back was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1770m at this track, at the bell was 7th-12.1 beaten 17 m by Coogee (2:11.70) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 15 at $34. Wait until the form picks up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in under pressure inside the final 200m.

Checked approaching the 200m when Coogee broke gait.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Sr4) over 1635m at Temora, beaten 45 m by Our Ultimate Bonny (2:00.90) in NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $51. Before that 8th (Sr2) over 2170m at Junee beaten 23 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $81. Will need improvement to figure.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr4) over 1770m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track beaten 35 m by The Heats On Lexy (2:11.20) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 9 at $7. At the run before 6th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early speed at Menangle beaten 35 m by Magnetic Storm (1:52.40) in 3yo+ 0LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR47 on February 24 at $12. Best form puts her right in this.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr4) over 1660m at Parkes, beaten 40 m by Soho Betty Dee (2:03.50) in 0-1 WIN on April 4 at $6. At the start before 8th (Sr2) over 2100m at Young beaten 40 m by Merrywood Rosie (2:38.40) in 1 WIN on February 3 at $11. Can bounce back. Can improve sharply dropping to maiden grade.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 1720m after racing wide at Young, at the bell was 7th-11.5 beaten 6 m by Peaksart (2:09.20) in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $34. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Sr4) over 1770m at this track, at the bell was 6th-11 beaten 10 m by Coogee (2:11.70) in 3yo+ MAIDEN on March 15 at $34. Worth including.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr7) over 1710m after being wide early at Goulburn was 2nd-2 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Happily (2:05.30) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $14. Very hard to beat.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr4) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 10 m by Elle Are Em (2:07.30) in MAIDEN on April 4 at $14. Bright prospects again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr4) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 10 m by Elle Are Em (2:07.30) in MAIDEN on April 4 at $14. Bright prospects again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride shortly after the start.
Tightened and commenced to hang in before breaking gait passing the 400m.
Became unbalanced and galloped shortly after entering the first turn.
Broke gait after the start. Broke gait free of interference leaving the 1600m.
Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.
